title: Stage 3 Jetson report
description: Extends the base sandbox report schema (report.schema.json) with the fields required to identify Group A (local MNN) and make the executing model's identity auditable. Group B (remote VLM) was decommissioned 2026-07-22 (docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md §0) and stage3_group now only accepts 'A'. See docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md.

stage3_group.description: Which Stage 3 group (docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md) this report covers. Group B (remote VLM) was decommissioned 2026-07-22; only 'A' is valid. Must never be confused with the historical Capability A/B demos.

cv_execution_location.description: CV always runs on the Jetson.

vlm_execution_location.description: The vision model always runs on the Jetson; the remote path was decommissioned.

backend.description: Must reflect the backend actually observed at inference time — never asserted from configuration alone.

manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the model manifest that was loaded, so the claimed identity is verifiable.

call_evidence.description: At least one real-call reference per case (request/response artifact reference), not a restatement of the case result.

hardware_validation_status.description: Must stay not_run until a reviewed immutable evidence record exists (jetson_runner/HARDWARE_VALIDATION.md). No Stage 3 report may set this to passed by itself.

production_eligible.description: Every Stage 3 report must keep this false until hardware validation passes and is reviewed.
